title: send_payment consumes diversifier index on build failure
description: send_payment calls next_diversifier() before build_shielded_tx(). If the build fails (AnchorMismatch, WitnessDeserialize, InsufficientFunds, etc.), the diversifier counter is permanently incremented but the address was never used for change. Per DESIGN.md §12, every PaymentAction::Address must be a fresh subaddress — wasting indices accelerates exhaustion and makes it impossible to audit which indices were actually assigned. Fix: only advance the diversifier counter after a successful broadcast, or roll it back on build failure.
